title: About the Centre
content: About the Centre Recognizing the critical need for interdisciplinary research, education, and innovation in the field of climate change and water research, the centre will provide a vision to become a leader in climate and water resource management. It aims to bridge the gap between research and practical solutions, serving as a hub for knowledge generation, capacity building, and policy advocacy. The centre will bring together experts from diverse fields to address complex environmental issues and support sustainable development goals.
